name: IRS Debt-Free, Inc.
description_short: Miami-based tax preparation and IRS representation firm offering filing services, back tax resolution, and IRS debt relief solutions for individuals and small businesses.
description_long:
IRS Debt-Free, Inc. is a Miami, Florida-based tax services firm founded and operated by Madelyn Vidal, an Enrolled Agent (EA) with over 10 years of experience in public accounting and tax. The firm serves individuals and small businesses seeking tax compliance, preparation, and IRS problem resolution. Vidal holds the highest credential the IRS awards to tax professionals, granting unlimited practice rights before the IRS, and is a member of the American Society of Tax Problem Solvers and Certified QuickBooks Pro Advisor with a degree from Florida International University School of Business.

The firm offers a broad range of tax and bookkeeping services including individual and business tax preparation, new business formation, monthly bookkeeping, offer in compromise, back tax filing, IRS payment plan negotiation, IRS audit representation, IRS lien and levy assistance, and payroll tax problem resolution. They provide both English and Spanish-language services and offer free initial consultations to assess client needs and tax relief eligibility.

What distinguishes IRS Debt-Free, Inc. is the owner's EA credential status, which provides clients with direct IRS representation rights equivalent to attorney representation. The firm combines tax preparation with dedicated IRS problem-solving, positioning itself as a one-stop resource for both preventative tax services and remedial debt relief. The personal ownership model and emphasis on the owner's specific credentials and experience suggest a boutique, relationship-focused practice rather than a large firm.

However, this is a small, single-owner practice with limited publicly available information about team size, case success rates, or detailed service offerings. No pricing, guarantees, client testimonials, or specific information about offer-in-compromise approval rates or settlement outcomes are provided on the website. As with any tax relief service, outcomes depend on individual circumstances, and prospective clients should verify credentials and discuss realistic expectations before engaging.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Owner is an Enrolled Agent (EA) with unlimited IRS practice rights—highest credential the IRS awards
Over 10 years of professional public accounting and tax experience
Offers comprehensive IRS representation services including audit defense, lien and levy resolution
Provides both tax preparation and IRS debt relief under one firm, simplifying coordination
Bilingual services (English and Spanish) serving Miami's diverse population
Member of American Society of Tax Problem Solvers, indicating professional commitment to tax relief
Free consultation available to assess eligibility and discuss options
cons: Small single-owner practice with no visible team or backup support structure
No published client testimonials, case results, or success rate data on website
No pricing information disclosed, making cost comparison impossible
Offer in compromise and settlement outcomes not documented or guaranteed
Limited information about response time, case processing timelines, or service capacity
best_for: Miami-area individuals and small business owners with IRS tax debt, back taxes, or unresolved tax notices
Bilingual Spanish-speaking taxpayers seeking IRS representation and tax services
Small business owners needing integrated tax preparation and ongoing bookkeeping support
diagnosis: Best for Miami-area individuals and small business owners with IRS tax debt or compliance issues who want direct EA representation and integrated tax services. Primary caveat: as a single-owner practice with no published results or transparent pricing, prospective clients should verify the scope of service availability and confirm realistic timelines and outcomes for their specific tax situation before engagement.
services: Offer in Compromise negotiation and filing
Back tax return preparation and filing
IRS payment plan negotiation and setup
Client portal access for new and existing clients
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
